list.name: 시스템 예외 발생
list.rawQuery: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime(substr(Time,1,19), '-9 hours')) AS time, CASE WHEN Description LIKE '%CameraTimeout%' OR Description LIKE '%NotInitializedCamera%' OR Description LIKE '%PrsImageDequeue%' THEN '[카메라] ' WHEN Description LIKE '%Udp%' THEN '[통신] ' WHEN Description LIKE '%Vision%' THEN '[비전] ' WHEN Description LIKE '%NoIllumination%' OR Description LIKE '%UnknownLight%' THEN '[조명] ' WHEN Description LIKE '%WrongSetting%' OR Description LIKE '%WrongGrid%' THEN '[설정] ' ELSE '[시스템] ' END || substr(Description, instr(Description, '] ')+2, 50) AS text, 'exception' AS tags FROM histories WHERE LogType=1 AND Description LIKE '%Exception:%' AND Time >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') ORDER BY Time ASC

panels.title: 현재 발생 알람
panels.description: Grafana 알람 규칙 중 현재 Firing / Pending 상태인 항목이 표시됩니다.

panels.title: 예외 발생 건수 (오늘)
panels.description: 오늘 histories에 기록된 GVision 예외 총 건수

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM histories WHERE LogType=1 AND Description LIKE '%Exception:%' AND date(Time) = date('now', '+9 hours')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM histories WHERE LogType=1 AND (Description LIKE '%CameraTimeOut%' OR Description LIKE '%NotInitializedCamera%' OR Description LIKE '%PrsImageDequeue%' OR Description LIKE '%CameraTrigger%') AND date(Time) = date('now', '+9 hours')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM histories WHERE LogType=1 AND (Description LIKE '%UdpBinding%' OR Description LIKE '%UdpSend%' OR Description LIKE '%UdpSocket%') AND date(Time) = date('now', '+9 hours')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM histories WHERE LogType=1 AND (Description LIKE '%VisionNotFound%' OR Description LIKE '%VisionIf%' OR Description LIKE '%HalconLicense%') AND date(Time) = date('now', '+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM histories WHERE LogType=1 AND (Description LIKE '%NoIllumination%' OR Description LIKE '%UnknownLight%') AND date(Time) = date('now', '+9 hours')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM histories WHERE LogType=1 AND (Description LIKE '%WrongSetting%' OR Description LIKE '%WrongGrid%' OR Description LIKE '%NotAllowedMode%' OR Description LIKE '%DuplicatedLot%') AND date(Time) = date('now', '+9 hours')

panels.title: 오류 발생 로그
panels.description: LogType=1(시스템) + Exception 포함 항목만 표시. [ErrorCode] ExceptionType: Message 형식.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', datetime(substr(Time,1,19), '-9 hours')) AS 시각, CASE WHEN Description LIKE '%CameraTimeout%' OR Description LIKE '%NotInitializedCamera%' OR Description LIKE '%PrsImageDequeue%' OR Description LIKE '%CameraTrigger%' THEN '카메라' WHEN Description LIKE '%Udp%' THEN '통신' WHEN Description LIKE '%VisionNotFound%' OR Description LIKE '%VisionIf%' OR Description LIKE '%HalconLicense%' THEN '비전' WHEN Description LIKE '%NoIllumination%' OR Description LIKE '%UnknownLight%' THEN '조명' WHEN Description LIKE '%WrongSetting%' OR Description LIKE '%WrongGrid%' OR Description LIKE '%NotAllowedMode%' OR Description LIKE '%DuplicatedLot%' THEN '설정' ELSE '기타' END AS 분류, CASE WHEN instr(Description, ']') > 0 THEN trim(substr(Description, 2, instr(Description, ']') - 2)) ELSE '?' END AS 코드, CASE WHEN instr(Description, ': ') > 0 THEN trim(substr(Description, instr(Description, ': ') + 2)) ELSE Description END AS 메시지 FROM histories WHERE LogType=1 AND Description LIKE '%Exception:%' AND Time >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') ORDER BY Time DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: 오류 유형별 발생 횟수
panels.description: 예외 종류별 누적 빈도. 가장 많은 유형부터 우선 점검.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN Description LIKE '%CameraTimeOut%' THEN 'CameraTimeout' WHEN Description LIKE '%NotInitializedCamera%' THEN 'Camera미초기화' WHEN Description LIKE '%PrsImageDequeue%' THEN 'PRS큐오류' WHEN Description LIKE '%CameraTrigger%' THEN 'CameraTrigger' WHEN Description LIKE '%UdpBinding%' THEN 'UDP바인딩오류' WHEN Description LIKE '%UdpSend%' THEN 'UDP송신오류' WHEN Description LIKE '%UdpSocket%' THEN 'UDP소켓오류' WHEN Description LIKE '%VisionNotFound%' THEN 'VisionNotFound' WHEN Description LIKE '%VisionIf%' THEN 'VisionIF오류' WHEN Description LIKE '%HalconLicense%' THEN 'HalconLicense' WHEN Description LIKE '%NoIllumination%' THEN 'NoIllumination' WHEN Description LIKE '%UnknownLight%' THEN '미확인조명' WHEN Description LIKE '%WrongSetting%' THEN 'WrongSetting' WHEN Description LIKE '%WrongGrid%' THEN 'WrongGridSize' WHEN Description LIKE '%NotAllowedMode%' THEN '모드요청오류' WHEN Description LIKE '%DuplicatedLot%' THEN 'LOT번호중복' ELSE '기타' END AS error_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM histories WHERE LogType=1 AND Description LIKE '%Exception:%' AND Time >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY error_type ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: 수율 추이 — 오류 발생 시점 마킹
panels.description: 빨간 수직선 = 예외 발생 시각. 오류 직후 수율 변화를 추적.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Item = 'PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS yield FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: 처리시간 (Duration) — 카메라 응답 속도 지표
panels.description: 처리시간 급등 = 카메라/조명 이상. 오류 annotation과 시점 대조.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, ROUND(AVG(Duration), 1) AS avg_ms, MAX(Duration) AS max_ms FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: XOffset / YOffset 드리프트 — 비전 정렬 지표
panels.description: 한쪽으로 지속 이동 = Alignment 이상. VisionNotFoundException 발생 전 패턴 확인.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, ROUND(AVG(XOffset), 3) AS x_offset, ROUND(AVG(YOffset), 3) AS y_offset FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC
